# Description

<!-- What is changing and why? -->

## Type of change
- [ ] Policy update
- [ ] Control documentation
- [ ] Evidence (sampled / non-sensitive only)
- [ ] Risk register
- [ ] Vendor register
- [ ] Website / external-facing content
- [ ] Tooling / CI

## Compliance impact
- [ ] Affects a SOC 2 control (specify: ____)
- [ ] Customer-facing change (notify required: yes / no)
- [ ] Subprocessor change (30-day notice scheduled)
- [ ] None

## Checklist
- [ ] Version + Revision History updated (for policies)
- [ ] No sensitive data committed (PII, secrets, raw logs)
- [ ] Cross-references updated (controls ↔ policies ↔ evidence)
- [ ] Reviewers per CODEOWNERS

## Evidence link
<!-- For policies/controls: where will the supporting evidence live? -->
